title: Chloachne oplismenoides
taxonomy:
I can find the classification of Chloachne oplismenoides. 
Chloachne oplismenoides is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the tribe Andropogoneae and is native to Australia. Further classification places it in the genus Chloachne and the subfamily Panicoideae.

side_effects: Chloachne oplismenoides, also known as Blue Pampas Grass or Blue Fountain Grass, is not commonly associated with significant side effects due to its limited uses in traditional medicine.
